caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is centered against a solid dark background, speaking to the camera. She wears a light green, patterned tunic with a small V-neckline and a thin black necklace. A small black lavalier microphone is clipped to the center of her neckline. Across the bottom of the scene, a small logo featuring a stylized yellow sun-like icon and the text "NPTEL" is visible in the lower corners. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in a static position, with the only changes being the movements of her mouth and slight shifts in her facial expressions as she talks. Her gaze remains focused forward, and her posture stays consistent across the duration of the clip.
